pipeline.title: 问路与位置 · 中译英

items.zh: 请问，最近的地铁站在哪里？——就在拐角处。
items.answer: Excuse me, where is the nearest subway station? -- Its just around the corner.

items.zh: 我怎么去博物馆？——直走在拐角左转。
items.answer: How do I get to the museum? -- Go straight and turn left at the corner.

items.zh: 最近的公交站在哪儿？——就在前面。
items.answer: Where is the nearest bus stop? -- Its just ahead.

pipeline.title: 问路与位置 · 英译中

items.en: Is there a pharmacy near here? -- Yes, theres one across the street.
items.answer: 附近有药店吗？——有的，街对面有一家。

items.en: How far is it from here? -- Its about 10 minutes on foot.
items.answer: 从这里有多远？——走路大约10分钟。

items.en: Am I going the right way to the station? -- Yes, keep going straight.
items.answer: 我去车站的方向对吗？——对，直走。

pipeline.title: 问路与位置 · 句型
slots: subway station, bus stop, ATM, restroom, pharmacy, hospital

slotValues.slot1: subway station, bus stop, ATM, restroom, pharmacy, hospital

items.answer: Where are the restrooms?

slotValues.slot1: restrooms, elevators, stairs, exits, lockers, ticket machines

items.answer: How do I get to the museum?

slotValues.slot1: the museum, the airport, the train station, the city center, your hotel

items.answer: Is there a pharmacy near here?

slotValues.slot1: pharmacy, supermarket, post office, park, bank, coffee shop

items.answer: How far is it from here?

slotValues.slot1: the airport, your hotel, the beach, downtown, the hospital

pipeline.title: 问路与位置 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基础句
levels.en: Excuse me, where is the nearest subway station?
levels.zh: 请问，最近的地铁站在哪里？

levels.label: 加回答
levels.en: Excuse me, where is the nearest subway station? -- Its just around the corner.
levels.zh: 请问，最近的地铁站在哪里？——就在拐角处。

levels.label: 加方向
levels.en: Excuse me, where is the nearest subway station? -- Its just around the corner. Go straight and turn left.
levels.zh: 请问，最近的地铁站在哪里？——就在拐角处。直走然后左转。

pipeline.title: 问时间与交通 · 中译英

items.zh: 我在哪里买票？——你可以在那边的机器上买。
items.answer: Where do I buy a ticket? -- You can buy one at the machine over there.

items.zh: 这班火车几点发车？——下午3点。
items.answer: What time does this train leave? -- At 3 pm.

items.zh: 去上海的高铁要多久？——大约5小时。
items.answer: How long does the high-speed train to Shanghai take? -- About 5 hours.

pipeline.title: 问时间与交通 · 英译中

items.en: Which platform does the train leave from? Platform 3.
items.answer: 火车从哪个站台出发？3号站台。

items.en: What time does the bus arrive?
items.answer: 公交车几点到？

items.en: Can you drop me off at the station?
items.answer: 你能在车站让我下车吗？

pipeline.title: 问时间与交通 · 句型

How long does it take to get there?

items.answer: Where do I buy a ticket?

pipeline.title: 乘坐公共交通 · 中译英

items.zh: 坐公交车去火车站要多久？——大概30分钟。
items.answer: How long does it take to get to the train station by bus? -- About 30 minutes.
How much is a metro ticket? -- 5 yuan.

items.zh: 这趟车到市中心吗？——到的。
items.answer: Does this bus go to the city center? -- Yes, it does.

pipeline.title: 乘坐公共交通 · 英译中

items.en: Which line goes to the airport? -- Take Line 10 to the end.
items.answer: 哪条线到机场？——坐10号线到终点站。

items.en: Do I need to transfer? -- Yes, change at the next station.
items.answer: 我需要换乘吗？——是的，下一站换乘。

items.en: How many stops to the train station? -- Three stops.
items.answer: 到火车站有几站？——三站。

items.answer: Does this bus go to the city center?
Which bus goes to the airport?
How long does it take by bus?

items.answer: How much is a bus ticket?
How many stops to the airport?

pipeline.title: 乘坐公共交通 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基础句
levels.en: How long does it take to get to the train station by bus?
levels.zh: 坐公交车去火车站要多久？

levels.label: 加回答
levels.en: How long does it take to get to the train station by bus? -- About 30 minutes.
levels.zh: 坐公交车去火车站要多久？——大概30分钟。

levels.label: 加下车
levels.en: How long does it take to get to the train station by bus? -- About 30 minutes. Get off at the third stop.
levels.zh: 坐公交车去火车站要多久？——大概30分钟。第三站下车。

pipeline.title: 问方向与距离 · 中译英

items.zh: 请问，这附近有银行吗？——有的，就在右边。
items.answer: Excuse me, is there a bank near here? -- Yes, its on the right.

items.zh: 去邮局怎么走？——一直走到红绿灯右转。
items.answer: How do I get to the post office? -- Go straight to the traffic light and turn right.

items.zh: 超市离这里远吗？——不远，拐角就是。
items.answer: Is the supermarket far from here? -- No, its just around the corner.

pipeline.title: 问方向与距离 · 英译中

items.en: Its about two blocks away. -- Is that far? -- No, just 5 minutes walk.
items.answer: 大概两个街区远。——远吗？——不远，走路5分钟。

items.en: How far is the park from here? -- Its only 10 minutes by bike.
items.answer: 公园离这里多远？——骑自行车只要10分钟。

items.en: Is there a pharmacy near here? -- Yes, theres one across the street.
items.answer: 附近有药店吗？——有的，街对面有一家。

pipeline.title: 问方向与距离 · 句型

items.answer: How far is the park from here? -- Its only 5 minutes walk.
items.pattern: How far is ___ from here? -- Its ___.

items.answer: How do I get to the post office? -- Go straight and turn right.

slotValues.slot1: the post office Go straight and turn right
slotValues.slot3: your hotel go straight for 2 blocks

items.answer: Is there a bank near here? -- Yes, its on the right.
Where is the nearest restroom? -- Go straight, its on your left.

slotValues.slot2: ATM go to the second floor
slotValues.slot3: exit go straight and turn left

items.answer: How long does it take to walk to the station? -- About 15 minutes.
items.pattern: How long does it take to walk to ___? -- ___.

pipeline.title: 问方向与距离 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基础句
levels.en: Excuse me, is there a bank near here?
levels.zh: 请问，这附近有银行吗？

levels.label: 加回答
levels.en: Excuse me, is there a bank near here? -- Yes, its on the right.
levels.zh: 请问，这附近有银行吗？——有的，就在右边。

levels.label: 加距离
levels.en: Excuse me, is there a bank near here? -- Yes, its on the right, about two blocks away.
levels.zh: 请问，这附近有银行吗？——有的，就在右边，大概两个街区。

pipeline.title: 打车与接送 · 中译英

items.zh: 请帮我打辆车。——好的，马上到。
items.answer: Please call a taxi for me. -- Sure, its coming right away.

items.zh: 去机场打表大概多少钱？——大概150块。
items.answer: How much is it to the airport by meter? -- About 150 yuan.

items.zh: 能帮我拿一下行李吗？——好的，没问题。
items.answer: Can you help me with my luggage? -- Sure, no problem.

pipeline.title: 打车与接送 · 英译中

items.en: Can you pick me up at 8?
items.answer: 你能8点来接我吗？

items.en: Please deliver the package to my office.
items.answer: 请把包裹送到我办公室。

items.en: What's your current location?
items.answer: 你现在在哪里？

pipeline.title: 打车与接送 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基础句
levels.en: Please call a taxi for me.
levels.zh: 请帮我打辆车。

levels.label: 加回应
levels.en: Please call a taxi for me. -- Sure, its coming right away.
levels.zh: 请帮我打辆车。——好的，马上到。

levels.label: 加目的地
levels.en: Please call a taxi for me. -- Sure, its coming right away. Please take me to the airport.
levels.zh: 请帮我打辆车。——好的，马上到。请送我去机场。

pipeline.title: 购物问询 · 中译英

items.zh: 你们有这个小号的吗？——我看看。有的，给你。
items.answer: Do you have this in a small size? -- Let me check. Yes, here you are.

items.zh: 这个多少钱？——今天打八折。
items.answer: How much is this? -- Its 20% off today.

items.zh: 你们收信用卡吗？——收的，什么卡都行。
items.answer: Do you accept credit cards? -- Yes, we accept all cards.

pipeline.title: 购物问询 · 英译中

items.en: Is there any discount on this item?
items.answer: 这件商品有折扣吗？

items.en: Do you have this in a larger size?
items.answer: 这个有大一点的尺寸吗？

items.en: The quality of this product is excellent.
items.answer: 这个产品的质量很好。

pipeline.title: 购物问询 · 句型

items.answer: How much is this?
How much are these?
Do you have this in a small size?

pipeline.title: 试穿与尺寸 · 中译英

items.zh: 我想试穿这个。试衣间在哪？——那边，左边。
items.answer: I want to try this on. Where is the fitting room? -- Over there, on the left.

items.zh: 这个有大号的吗？——有的，我给你拿。
items.answer: Do you have this in a large size? -- Yes, let me get one for you.

items.zh: 这个有点小，你们有中号吗？
items.answer: This is a bit small. Do you have medium?

pipeline.title: 试穿与尺寸 · 英译中

items.en: Do you have this in medium? -- Let me check for you.
items.answer: 你们有中号的吗？——我帮你查一下。

items.en: This is too small. Do you have a larger size?
items.answer: 这个太小了。有大一号的吗？

items.en: How does it fit? -- Its a little tight.
items.answer: 穿着怎么样？——有点紧。

pipeline.title: 餐厅点餐 · 中译英

items.zh: 你推荐什么？——烤鱼很受欢迎。
items.answer: What do you recommend? -- The grilled fish is very popular.
Could I have the menu, please? -- Sure, here you are.

items.zh: 我要一份烤鱼和米饭。——好的，马上来。
items.answer: I would like to order the grilled fish and rice. -- OK, coming right up.

items.answer: 今日特色菜是鱼。

items.en: I'll have the chef's special.
items.answer: 我要主厨推荐。

items.answer: Could I have the bill, please? -- Sure, coming right up.

items.answer: How does this dish taste? -- Its very good, very fresh.

items.zh: 这家餐厅的评价很好。——是啊，我朋友也推荐。
items.answer: This restaurant has great reviews. -- Yes, my friend recommended it too.

items.en: I love the flavor of this dish.
items.answer: 我喜欢这道菜的味道。

levels.label: 基础句

pipeline.title: 认识新朋友 · 中译英

items.zh: 你是做什么的？——我是学生。/ 我在医院工作。
items.answer: What do you do? -- Im a student. / I work in a hospital.

items.zh: 你在这里上学吗？——是的，我在大学学设计。
items.answer: Do you study here? -- Yes, I study design at the university.

items.zh: 你平时喜欢做什么？——我喜欢摄影。
items.answer: What do you like to do in your free time? -- I like photography.

items.answer: 你喜欢什么类型的音乐？

items.answer: What sport do you like? -- I like playing basketball.

pipeline.title: 约见面 · 中译英

items.zh: 你这周末有空吗？——有空，怎么啦？
items.answer: Are you free this weekend? -- Yes, I am. Why?

items.zh: 一起吃午饭吧？——好呀，哪里见？
items.answer: Lets grab lunch together? -- Sure, where shall we meet?

items.zh: 我们下午3点在咖啡厅见吧？——好的，到时见。
items.answer: Shall we meet at the cafe at 3 pm? -- OK, see you then.

pipeline.title: 约见面 · 英译中

items.en: Let's set up a meeting for Friday.
items.answer: 我们周五安排个见面吧。

items.answer: 你这周的时间安排怎么样？

items.en: I'll arrange a time for us to meet.
items.answer: 我来安排我们见面的时间。

pipeline.title: 关心与问候 · 中译英

items.zh: 一切都好吗？你看起来累了。——嗯，没事，只是没睡好。
items.answer: Is everything okay? You look tired. -- Yeah, Im fine. Just didnt sleep well.

items.zh: 你还好吗？——我没事，谢谢关心。
items.answer: Are you okay? -- Im fine, thanks for asking.

items.zh: 你看起来很累，要不要休息一下？
items.answer: You look tired. Do you want to take a break?

items.answer: 你应该休息一下。

pipeline.title: 打电话找人 · 中译英

items.zh: 王先生方便接电话吗？——对不起，他正在开会。
items.answer: Is Mr. Wang available? -- Sorry, hes in a meeting right now.

items.zh: 他什么时候回来？——大概一小时后。
items.answer: When will he be back? -- In about an hour.

items.zh: 我稍后再打。——好的，我帮你转达。
items.answer: I will call back later. -- OK, I will let him know.

pipeline.title: 打电话找人 · 英译中

items.en: The phone is ringing. Can you answer it?
items.answer: 电话在响。你能接一下吗？

items.en: He's not in the office right now.
items.answer: 他现在不在办公室。

items.en: Please hold the line. I'll connect you.
items.answer: 请别挂断。我帮你转接。

pipeline.title: 打电话找人 · 句型

items.answer: Is Mr Wang there, please?
Who's calling, please? — This is Toms friend.
Is Mr Wang available?
When is he back?
When is a good time to call back?
items.pattern: When is a good time to ___?

pipeline.title: 留言与回电 · 中译英

items.zh: 我想留言，可以吗？——好的，请说。
items.answer: I want to leave a message. Is that okay? -- Sure. Go ahead.

items.zh: 请让他回电话给我。——好的，你的号码是？
items.answer: Please ask him to call me back. -- Sure. Whats your number?

items.zh: 你能帮我转告他吗？——当然，你说。
items.answer: Can you pass a message to him? -- Of course, go ahead.

pipeline.title: 留言与回电 · 英译中

items.en: Please leave a voicemail after the beep.
items.answer: 请听到提示音后留言。

items.en: I'll reply to your message as soon as possible.
items.answer: 我会尽快回复你的留言。

items.en: How can I contact you later?
items.answer: 我以后怎么联系你？

pipeline.title: 留言与回电 · 句型

items.answer: Is Mr Wang there, please?
Who's calling, please? — This is Toms friend.
Is Mr Wang available?
When is he back?
When is a good time to call back?
items.pattern: When is a good time to ___?

pipeline.title: 电话确认 · 中译英

items.zh: 王先生方便接电话吗？——对不起，他正在开会。
items.answer: Is Mr. Wang available? -- Sorry, hes in a meeting right now.

items.zh: 他什么时候回来？——大约一小时后回来。
items.answer: When is he back? -- He is back in about an hour.

items.zh: 我打电话确认一下明天的会议。——好的，我帮你查。
items.answer: I am calling to confirm tomorrows meeting. -- OK, let me check for you.

pipeline.title: 电话确认 · 英译中

items.en: Please confirm your reservation by email.
items.answer: 请通过邮件确认预约。

items.en: Let me check the details of your booking.
items.answer: 让我查看一下你的预订详情。

items.en: Can I change my appointment time?
items.answer: 我能改一下预约时间吗？

items.answer: Is Mr Wang there, please?
Who's calling, please? — This is Toms friend.
Is Mr Wang available?

pipeline.title: 电话确认 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基础句
levels.en: Is Mr. Wang available?
levels.zh: 王先生方便接电话吗？

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: Is Mr. Wang available? -- Sorry, hes in a meeting right now.
levels.zh: 王先生方便接电话吗？——对不起，他正在开会。

levels.label: 加后续
levels.en: Is Mr. Wang available? -- Sorry, hes in a meeting right now. I am calling to confirm tomorrows meeting.
levels.zh: 王先生方便接电话吗？——对不起，他正在开会。我打电话确认明天的会议。

pipeline.title: 问联系方式 · 中译英

items.zh: 我怎么联系你？——你可以打我的手机。
items.answer: How can I contact you? -- You can call my mobile.
Whats your phone number? -- Its 138-5555-1234.

items.zh: 你能给我你的邮箱吗？——好的，我写给你。
items.answer: Can you give me your email? -- Sure, let me write it down.

pipeline.title: 问联系方式 · 英译中

items.en: How can I reach you?
items.answer: 我怎么联系你？

items.en: What's your social media account?
items.answer: 你的社交媒体账号是什么？

items.en: Please write down your home address.
items.answer: 请写下你的家庭地址。

items.answer: Is Mr Wang there, please?

pipeline.title: 问联系方式 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基础句
levels.en: How can I contact you?
levels.zh: 我怎么联系你？

levels.label: 加号码
levels.en: How can I contact you? -- You can call my mobile.
levels.zh: 我怎么联系你？——你可以打我的手机。

levels.label: 加邮箱
levels.en: How can I contact you? -- You can call my mobile or email me at LiMing@email.com.
levels.zh: 我怎么联系你？——你可以打我手机或发邮件到LiMing@email.com。

pipeline.title: 电话问题处理 · 中译英

items.zh: 我听不清你说话，信号不好。——抱歉，我换个地方打。
items.answer: I cant hear you clearly, the signal is bad. -- Sorry, I will call from somewhere else.

items.zh: 你好像打错了。——哦，对不起，我再查一下。
items.answer: I think you have the wrong number. -- Oh, sorry, let me check again.

items.zh: 你能说清楚一点吗？——好的，我慢慢说。
items.answer: Can you speak more clearly? -- OK, I will speak slowly.

pipeline.title: 电话问题处理 · 英译中

items.en: There's a lot of interference on the line.
items.answer: 线上有很多干扰。

items.en: I can hear static noise. Can you speak up?
items.answer: 我能听到静电噪音。你能大点声吗？

items.en: Please don't hang up. I'll check.
items.answer: 请别挂断。我查一下。

pipeline.title: 电话问题处理 · 句型

items.answer: Is Mr Wang there, please?
Who's calling, please? — This is Toms friend.
Is Mr Wang available?
When is he back?
When is a good time to call back?
items.pattern: When is a good time to ___?

pipeline.title: 电话问题处理 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基础句
levels.en: The signal is bad. Can you hear me?
levels.zh: 信号不好。你能听到吗？

levels.label: 加回应
levels.en: The signal is bad. Can you hear me? -- Not clearly. Can you speak more loudly?
levels.zh: 信号不好。你能听到吗？——不太清楚。你能大声点吗？

levels.label: 加解决
levels.en: The signal is bad. Can you hear me? -- Not clearly. I will call you again from somewhere else.
levels.zh: 信号不好。你能听到吗？——不太清楚。我换个地方再打给你。

pipeline.title: 紧急呼救 · 中译英

items.zh: 最近的医院在哪？——大约3公里远。
items.answer: Where is the nearest hospital? -- Its about 3 kilometers from here.

items.zh: 救命！有人受伤了。——别担心，我叫救护车。
items.answer: Help! Someone is hurt. -- Dont worry, I will call an ambulance.
Please call an ambulance for me!

pipeline.title: 紧急呼救 · 英译中

items.en: This is an emergency! Please call 911!
items.answer: 这是紧急情况！请打911！

items.en: Please call the police right away!
items.answer: 请立刻报警！

items.en: There is danger. Please help us!
items.answer: 有危险。请救救我们！

pipeline.title: 紧急呼救 · 句型

items.answer: Where is the nearest hospital?
How do I call an ambulance?
Is there a doctor here?
Is everyone okay?

pipeline.title: 问路求助 · 中译英

items.zh: 请帮帮我，我迷路了。——好的，你想去哪？
items.answer: Please help me. Im lost. -- Of course. Where do you want to go?

items.zh: 你能帮我一下吗？我在找这家酒店。
items.answer: Can you help me? Im looking for this hotel.

items.zh: 请问这个地址怎么走？——一直走，第二个路口右转。
items.answer: How do I get to this address? -- Go straight, turn right at the second crossing.

pipeline.title: 问路求助 · 英译中

items.en: Could you guide me to the nearest hospital?

items.en: I'm trying to find this address.
items.answer: 我想找这个地址。

items.en: Can you show me the way on this map?
items.answer: 你能在地图上给我指路吗？

pipeline.title: 看病问诊 · 中译英

items.zh: 我不舒服。最近的医院在哪？——打车大约10分钟。
items.answer: I dont feel well. Where is the nearest hospital? -- Its about 10 minutes by taxi.

items.zh: 我需要看医生。——好的，我帮你挂号。
items.answer: I need to see a doctor. -- OK, I will register for you.

items.zh: 你有什么症状？——我头疼，还有点发烧。
items.answer: What are your symptoms? -- I have a headache and a little fever.

items.en: I have a sharp pain in my stomach.
items.answer: 我胃疼得厉害。

items.en: Do you have a fever?
items.answer: 你发烧吗？

items.en: Let me examine you. Does it hurt here?
items.answer: 让我检查一下。这里疼吗？

pipeline.title: 丢失物品 · 中译英

items.zh: 我的钱包丢了！你看到了吗？——没有，你去失物招领处问问。
items.answer: I lost my wallet! Have you seen it? -- No, go ask at the lost and found.

items.zh: 我的包忘在出租车上了。——你有发票吗？
items.answer: I left my bag in the taxi. -- Do you have the receipt?

items.zh: 我的手机不见了！能帮我打一下吗？
items.answer: My phone is missing! Can you call it for me?

pipeline.title: 丢失物品 · 英译中

items.en: I left my phone in my pocket.
items.answer: 我把手机忘在口袋里了。

items.en: Please check the lost and found at the station.
items.answer: 请去车站的失物招领处看看。

items.en: You can ask at the information desk.
items.answer: 你可以去问讯台问问。

pipeline.title: 丢失物品 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I lost my ___. Where is the lost and found?

items.zh: 我的___丢了。失物招领处在哪？
items.answer: I lost my wallet. Where is the lost and found?
items.pattern: I lost my ___. Where is the lost and found?

items.answer: Did you see my phone? -- No, I didnt.
What color is your wallet? -- Its black.

pipeline.title: 语言沟通困难 · 中译英

items.zh: 对不起，我不会说英语。——没关系，我慢慢说。
items.answer: Sorry, I dont speak English. -- No problem, I will speak slowly.

items.zh: 你明白我的意思吗？——不太明白，你能再说一遍吗？
items.answer: Do you understand what I mean? -- Not really, can you say it again?
Please speak more slowly. -- OK, sorry.

pipeline.title: 语言沟通困难 · 英译中

items.en: Could you please speak more slowly?
items.answer: 你能说慢一点吗？

items.en: Could you repeat that please?
items.answer: 你能重复一遍吗？

items.en: Can you translate this for me?
items.answer: 你能帮我翻译一下吗？

Can you speak more slowly?
